code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import{io}from"socket.io-client";import API from"../services/api";import MatchCard from"../components/MatchCard";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const socket=io("http://localhost:5000");function Matches(){const[matches,setMatches]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{const fetchMatches=async()=>{try{setLoading(true);const res=await API.get("/matches");console.log("Matches fetched:",res.data);setMatches(res.data);setError(null);}catch(err){console.error("Error fetching matches:",err);setError(err.message);setMatches([]);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchMatches();socket.on("matchUpdated",updatedMatch=>{setMatches(prevMatches=>prevMatches.map(m=>m._id===updatedMatch._id?updatedMatch:m));});return()=>{socket.off("matchUpdated");};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Live Matches"}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{textAlign:'center',color:'#666'},children:"Loading matches..."}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{textAlign:'center',color:'red'},children:["Error: ",error]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"matches-grid",children:!loading&&matches.length>0?matches.map(match=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MatchCard,{match:match},match._id)):!loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{textAlign:'center',color:'#999',gridColumn:'1/-1'},children:"No matches available at the moment."}):null}),!loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{textAlign:'center',color:'#999',fontSize:'12px',marginTop:'20px'},children:["Total matches: ",matches.length]})]});}export default Matches;
